EU_AI_Act_Article_13.requirement: Transparency for high-risk AI with understandable decision information
EU_AI_Act_Article_13.implementation: LEWIS causal necessity/sufficiency scores are generated per feature and saved as auditable tables
EU_AI_Act_Article_13.gap: Multi-class LEWIS extension remains a novel contribution and requires external peer validation

EU_AI_Act_Article_14.requirement: Human oversight with meaningful intervention ability
EU_AI_Act_Article_14.implementation: Counterfactual feasibility constraints flag non-actionable macro features to support human override
EU_AI_Act_Article_14.gap: Oversight quality depends on analyst training and policy integration

BaFin_AI_Guidelines_2024.requirement: Auditability and traceability of model behavior in banking context
BaFin_AI_Guidelines_2024.implementation: Pipeline saves reproducible artifacts for model, DAG, explanation tables, and logs
BaFin_AI_Guidelines_2024.gap: Operational controls for production deployment are out of scope of thesis prototype

MiFID_II_Article_25.requirement: Suitability and justification of investment recommendations
MiFID_II_Article_25.implementation: Actionability-aware counterfactual checks reduce infeasible recommendation drivers
MiFID_II_Article_25.gap: Client-specific suitability dimensions require additional profile data
